home.hero.headline: MEGA X
home.hg.title: Sparking Intelligence
home.philosophy.1.label: I · Autonomy
home.philosophy.1.body: When an agent replaces a department, the unit of enterprise shifts from headcount to capability.
home.philosophy.1.accent: Deploy a department — not a person.
home.philosophy.2.label: II · Intelligence
home.philosophy.2.body: Trillion-dollar industries emerge from architectures that run autonomously and export value at machine speed.
home.philosophy.3.label: III · Connectivity
home.philosophy.3.body: Silicon. Spectrum. Connectivity. The nervous system beneath every AI agent and autonomous economy.
home.philosophy.3.accent: We design it from first principles.
home.pillar.phyntom-x8.body: Certified AI Departments for non-technical businesses. We encode your expertise into accountable, ongoing AI operations.
home.pillar.fann.body: Reality-output gaming. AI-native 4A metaverse where play becomes measurable wealth.
home.pillar.chipnexus.body: Full-band wireless silicon. Sub-1 GHz to Wi-Fi 7. The fabric that connects all things.
home.closing.h2:
In the age of AI, the architecture of
productivity begins with the decision to rebuild it.

company.hero.subtitle: When AI rewrites the logic of production, the question is no longer what you build — but what you own. We own the architecture.
company.values.1.title: Own the Stack
company.values.1.body: From silicon to agent — vertical integration is the only defensible position in the age of AI.
company.values.2.title: Ship Autonomy
company.values.2.body: A company that still needs humans in every loop is a company that hasn't started the transition.
company.values.3.title: First Principles
company.values.3.body: We don't optimize legacy systems. We design from the physics up — spectrum, silicon, architecture.
company.values.4.title: Structural Ambition
company.values.4.body: We build for paradigm shifts, not product cycles. Every division is a bet on a new industrial category.
company.careers.body: We hire architects — of silicon, of systems, of autonomous intelligence. If you want to define the production stack of the AI era, not just optimize the last one, we should talk.
company.team.anjum.bio: 150+ years of construction & engineering heritage. Founded Manhattan X Holding to build the foundational infrastructure for the intelligent era.
company.team.jamie.bio: MIT graduate, former McKinsey Senior Engagement Manager. Co-founded Masdar Investment LLC with Oman Royal Families.
company.team.faiqa.bio: Former Intel leader. Orchestrates cross-border investment flows across the Gulf and Asia. Founder of EliteIkon Global with 10,000+ investors per year.
company.team.jacques.bio: Co-Founder of Figure S — AI-native immersive character platform. VP, Unimine Tech — UE5 UGC platform & zero-code world editor. Global-scale architectures with long-horizon capital partners. Dual degree: Synthetic Biology + Engineering Design, UC Davis.
company.team.jianyu.bio: 20+ years in game engines & large-scale digital systems. Co-founded Youmi Entertainment — RMB 150M angel from TikTok. Built world's first AI-native AAA game architecture. APAAS virtual world platform — UGC, AIGC & AI orchestration.
company.team.zhiyong.bio: 25+ years in semiconductors & robotics. Director of China National Software & IC Platform. Co-founder of Perfconn (Top 3 global Wi-Fi chip company).
company.team.kevin.bio: 20+ years in SoC design (28nm/16nm/12nm). Former CEO of Marvell. Deep expertise in storage, networking, and AI chip design.
company.team.rebecca.bio: Directed $5B+ into 100+ enterprises. Investment Partner at SVB Capital. Founder of China SME Venture Capital Fund.
company.team.roy.bio: 30+ years in semiconductor & EDA. Former TI. Led two EDA companies to Nasdaq IPOs.
company.team.mingxian.bio: "Father of Semiconductors in Asia." Contributed to founding 20 semiconductor companies.
company.team.jade.bio: Led silicon development at Nokia, Apple, Microsoft, AWS. RF products with 100M+ unit shipments.
company.team.cao.bio: 20+ years at Nokia, Huawei, Ericsson. RF designs deployed in hundreds of millions of devices.
company.team.dr-z.bio: Former HiSilicon. Wi-Fi AP chips with 100M+ unit shipments. 15+ years in wireless connectivity.
company.team.dr-han.bio: Former CEO/CTO of FCI (Silicon Motion). Co-founded RF Solutions Inc., acquired by Skyworks.
company.team.john-long.bio: Former Motorola RF Engineer, Delphi Plant Manager. Extensive international manufacturing experience.
company.team.robert.bio: Cambridge/CSR background. Developed world's first CMOS Bluetooth chip (2B+ units sold, acquired by Qualcomm).
company.team.jonathan.bio: Processor design and FPGA verification. Core team from Cambridge/CSR and Texas Instruments.
company.team.nicky.bio: 30+ years in RF and MIMO. Co-founded Neul (NB-IoT standard, acquired by Huawei).

phyntom.hero.stat1.label: Avg. Productivity Gain
phyntom.hero.stat2.label: To Full Deployment
phyntom.hero.right.h2: We run AI so your business runs better — without you becoming a tech person.
phyntom.hero.right.body: Certified AI Department is a fully managed AI operations service. We audit your workflows, work with you to deploy the agent flow, and maintain everything. You get the results. We handle the complexity.
phyntom.services.label: 01 / What We Run
phyntom.services.title:
We Handle
The Work.
phyntom.services.financial.name: Financial Operations
phyntom.services.financial.desc: Monthly investor updates, cash flow projections, financial summaries, and pitch materials — generated automatically, reviewed by a domain expert before you see them.
phyntom.services.creative.name: Creative Production
phyntom.services.creative.desc: Story briefs, character arcs, content calendars, campaign copy, brand narratives — your creative output scaled without scaling your team. Your voice, produced at volume.
phyntom.services.ops.name: Operations Intelligence
phyntom.services.ops.desc: Weekly performance reports, pipeline summaries, project updates, team briefings — the operational knowledge your business generates, organized and delivered on schedule.
phyntom.industries.label: 02 / Industries
phyntom.industries.title:
Built For
Your World.
phyntom.industries.studio.name: Game & Entertainment Studios
phyntom.industries.studio.desc: Story generation, character development, world-building briefs, and narrative production — automated from your creative direction.
phyntom.industries.agency.name: Marketing & Design Agencies
phyntom.industries.agency.desc: Pitch decks, campaign briefs, client reports, and content pipelines — your team's expertise running at a pace no hire could match.
phyntom.industries.event.name: Events & Experience Companies
phyntom.industries.event.desc: Sponsorship decks, vendor communications, post-event reports, and season planning — produced while you're focused on the event itself.
phyntom.cert.label: 03 / The Standard
phyntom.cert.title:
What "Certified"
Actually Means.
phyntom.cert.1.title: It Runs Without You
phyntom.cert.1.desc: Your AI Department handles work automatically, on schedule. You don't log in, press buttons, or check if it worked. If anything stops working, we tell you first.
phyntom.cert.2.title: You Only See Work That's Ready
phyntom.cert.2.desc: Before anything reaches you, we check it. If the output isn't good enough, it doesn't leave our hands. You see finished work, not drafts that need cleaning up.
phyntom.cert.3.title: If You're Not Happy, We Fix It Fast
phyntom.cert.3.desc: Tell us something's wrong. We respond the same day and have it resolved within 48 hours. No runaround, no blame, no explanation needed.
phyntom.cert.4.title: You Always Know What You're Paying For
phyntom.cert.4.desc: We keep a plain-English record of exactly what your AI Department does. You can ask to see it anytime. If we change how something works, we tell you before we do it.
phyntom.cert.5.title: A Real Person Is Responsible
phyntom.cert.5.desc: There's an actual expert — not just software — who is accountable for the quality of your AI Department's output. You know who they are. You can reach them.
phyntom.cert.6.title: Your Work Is Always Yours
phyntom.cert.6.desc: If you ever want to leave, we hand you everything — a complete record of how your AI Department works — within one week. No lock-in. No hostage data.
phyntom.process.label: 04 / How It Works
phyntom.process.1.title: Free Assessment
phyntom.process.1.desc: One 60-minute call. We map the specialist work your business currently pays people to do — and identify the highest-value things to automate first.
phyntom.process.2.title: We Build It Together
phyntom.process.2.desc: Two to three sessions. We work directly with you to encode your expertise into the workflows. You review every output before anything goes live.
phyntom.process.3.title: Certified & Live
phyntom.process.3.desc: Your AI Department launches. Runs on schedule, produces certified-quality output, sends you a weekly summary of everything it did.
phyntom.process.4.title: We Keep It Running
phyntom.process.4.desc: Your retainer covers ongoing management, quality monitoring, improvements, and a named expert always responsible for what comes out.
phyntom.cta.title:
Your AI
Department
Starts Here.
phyntom.cta.sub: A free 60-minute assessment. No pitch, no pressure. We'll tell you exactly what's worth automating in your business and what isn't.
fann.hero.sub: The world's first AI game production line — where intelligence creates worlds, breeds champions, and exports economies at machine scale.
fann.vision.title:
We are a new species —
Reality-Output Gaming.
fann.vision.lede: Empower everyone with an AI that earns for them, continuously, in a virtual world. Players input time, strategy, and expertise — our Prophecy Engine powers AI agents that run matches, manage assets, and create tradable value, monetized on a compliant exchange.
fann.prometheus.subtitle: II · Prometheus Framework X
fann.prometheus.body: An end-to-end AIGC toolchain covering character generation, world building, vehicle and weapon design, and interactive AI — engineered for rapid cultural localization.
fann.prometheus.stat1.label: Productivity gains
fann.prometheus.stat2.label: Labor cost reduction
fann.prometheus.module.1.body: Generate full AI teams — every player or horse operates autonomously.
fann.prometheus.module.2.body: Equip stars with cognitive abilities and lifelike in-game behavior.
fann.prometheus.module.3.body: Simulate team dynamics and tactics with emergent collective intelligence.
fann.prometheus.module.4.body: Physically accurate, continuously learned movement — every stride procedurally generated.
fann.prometheus.module.5.body: Continuous reinforcement pipelines — agents improve match over match.
fann.prometheus.module.6.body: Sculpt stars end-to-end — face, body, voice, personality — in minutes not months.
fann.prometheus.module.7.body: Design fleets — from race cars to mechs — with full physics and culture parameters.
fann.prometheus.module.8.body: Precision tools for combat and sport — balance, behavior, and narrative baked in.
fann.prometheus.module.9.body: Dynamically generate venues shaped by culture, climate, and AI evolution.
fann.positioning.body: We operate at the exclusive intersection of gaming, sport, digital assets, and AI — the four arenas shaping the next decade of global value.
fann.market.1.name: Global Gaming
fann.market.1.desc: Top-tier 4A experiences — AI-native production, cinematic worlds, continuous play.
fann.market.2.name: Sports & Fan Economy
fann.market.2.desc: Deep engagement layered with true ownership — fans become operators, not spectators.
fann.market.3.name: Digital Assets & Web3
fann.market.3.desc: Assets with genuine cash flow and utility — not speculation, but programmable yield.
fann.market.4.name: AI Agent Services
fann.market.4.desc: A platform to validate and trade AI capabilities — productivity you can own, audit, and exchange.
fann.reality.h2: An engine where play becomes measurable wealth.
fann.reality.body: Three layers of value creation, one continuous loop — input, cognition, output.
fann.reality.bullet1: Input — Players commit time, strategy, and expertise.
fann.reality.bullet2: Cognition — Prophecy Engine AI agents run matches, manage assets, and generate outcomes.
fann.reality.bullet3: Output — Tradable AI-football star NFTs, verifiable agent productivity, real returns via the Vision Exchange.
fann.aethelgard.name: Aethelgard: The Eternal Arena
fann.aethelgard.tagline: The world's first 4A AI-powered virtual sports league — a reality-output economic reactor running 24/7 across three infinite domains.
fann.domain.1.body: Own AI players · Design tactics · Monetize strategy. A 24/7 Virtual World Cup.
fann.domain.2.body: Autonomous AI teams, infinite generated tournaments, high-frequency performance markets tied to live narrative.
fann.domain.3.body: DNA breeding, digital ownership, real-time valuation, venue commissions. Where biology meets community-powered growth.
fann.starmaker.h2:
You create the stars.
You operate the system. You share the rewards.
fann.starmaker.body: Not a spectator — part of the system. Stronger performance increases asset value; deeper insight creates an edge.
fann.flywheel.1.body: Train AI athletes. Shape their style, personality, abilities. They learn, remember, evolve.
fann.flywheel.2.body: Build arenas, rules, and tactical ecosystems. Participate in every event — not a spectator, an operator.
fann.flywheel.3.body: Earn from IP growth and performance markets. Deeper insight creates an edge. Performance compounds value.
fann.shariah.body: Interest-free. Knowledge-driven. Fully auditable on-chain. Unlocking direct access to the Middle East's trillion-dollar digital economy through a compliant, transparent, and regulated infrastructure.
fann.closing.h2:
AI forges the game.
You own the world.
chipnexus.overview.body1: The only company with a complete portfolio covering sub-1 GHz HaLow, 2.4/5/6 GHz Wi-Fi 6/7, and 5G-NR RF — all under one design team.
chipnexus.overview.body2: Software-Defined Radio with PUF hardware security and on-chip edge-AI inference — integrated at silicon level.
chipnexus.product.freya.body: One software-defined silicon spanning sub-1 GHz to Wi-Fi 7. Routers, smart cities, V2X, defense — retuned in firmware, not respun in fab.
chipnexus.product.glink.body: Kilometre-scale connectivity at coin-cell power. The fabric beneath smart cities, grids, agriculture, and the long tail of connected infrastructure.
chipnexus.product.flexv.body: A defense-grade SDR platform that turns silicon into a moving target — adapting waveforms faster than any adversary can characterize them.
chipnexus.market.body: The global RF chip market was valued at $46.5B in 2024. Wi-Fi 6/6E/7 chipsets alone are projected to reach $80.9B by 2030, with Wi-Fi 7 comprising $22.9B of that total.
chipnexus.market.bar1.label: RF 2024
chipnexus.market.bar2.label: Wi-Fi 2030
chipnexus.market.bar3.label: Wi-Fi 7
chipnexus.market.bar4.label: MEGAX
chipnexus.channel.1.body: Smart city & 5G IoT deployments via operator partnerships
chipnexus.channel.2.body: Smart home, TV, tablet & wearable device integration
chipnexus.timeline.1.body: Wi-Fi 6 SoC mass production. HaLow G-Link and Freya design optimization. Wi-Fi 7 teams onboarded.
chipnexus.timeline.2.body: HaLow & Freya mass production on TSMC. First commercial revenue. FCC/CE/SRRC certifications filed.
chipnexus.timeline.3.body: Wi-Fi 7 AP Baseband and SoC reach mass production. Neural Network module sales begin.
chipnexus.timeline.4.body: Full portfolio generating revenue at scale. Base-case projection: ~$85M.
chipnexus.timeline.5.body: Revenue toward $1.5B target. Top-tier wireless chipset company globally.
chipnexus.adv.1.body: The only provider offering HaLow, Wi-Fi 6/7, and 5G-NR RF transceivers from a single design team.
chipnexus.adv.2.body: TSMC and GlobalFoundries at 22–40nm nodes eliminate single-supplier risk and ensure capacity resilience.
chipnexus.adv.3.body: Wi-Fi 6 SoC generates chip revenue plus recurring royalty — $4M licensing fee + $0.12 per-chip royalty.
chipnexus.cta.body: Whether you're an investor, OEM partner, or enterprise customer — we'd like to hear from you.
fusion.body: We are building this page now. The ultimate clean energy source — powering the world's growing computational and industrial demands — is coming soon.
freya.hero.lede: A single chip architecture engineered to span sub-1 GHz to Wi-Fi 7 — software-defined, defense-grade, and ready for seven domains of deployment.
freya.sov.body: When connectivity is owned by foreign vendors, every device becomes a sovereignty risk. Freya is designed from first principles for verifiable, on-shore production — and reprogrammable in the field as standards and threats evolve.
freya.sov.p1.s: Sourcing, fab partners, and BoM verified end-to-end.
freya.sov.p2.s: One silicon, infinite waveforms — patch in firmware, not new hardware.
freya.arch.body: Freya unifies what used to require a portfolio of single-purpose radios. Wi-Fi 7 access points, smart-meter HaLow nodes, V2X RSUs, tactical SDRs — the same programmable core, retuned in firmware.
freya.arch.accent: From living rooms to the battlefield.
freya.scen1.t1.p: Wi-Fi 5/6/6E/7 high-speed home connectivity for any density.
freya.scen1.t2.p: Whole-home seamless coverage — roaming without re-auth.
freya.scen1.t3.p: Locks, sensors, cameras — one unified wireless fabric.
freya.scen1.t4.p: Sub-millisecond wireless for immersive head-worn computing.
freya.scen2.t1.p: Long-range, low-power IoT — kilometres on a coin cell.
freya.scen2.t2.p: Urban sensor networks for traffic, lighting, and air.
freya.scen2.t4.p: Soil, weather, and livestock telemetry across hectares.
freya.scen3.t1.p: Deterministic wireless control for factory floors.
freya.scen3.t2.p: Mobile-robot fleets with sub-10ms control latency.
freya.scen3.t3.p: High-bandwidth wireless camera feeds in motion.
freya.scen4.t1.p: Dense urban deployment with multi-band agility.
freya.scen4.t2.p: Customer premises equipment for fixed wireless access.
freya.scen4.t3.p: LEO/GEO ground terminals with steerable beams.
freya.scen4.t4.p: Microwave + mmWave links for carrier infrastructure.
freya.scen5.t1.p: Vehicle-to-everything: cars, lights, peers, the cloud.
freya.scen5.t2.p: Roadside units broadcasting traffic state and warnings.
freya.scen5.t4.p: In-vehicle wireless for passengers and infotainment.
freya.scen6.t2.p: Software-defined radios reprogrammed in the field.
freya.scen6.t3.p: Battlefield mesh comms — jam-resilient and mobile.
freya.scen6.t4.p: UAV control and telemetry under contested spectrum.
freya.scen7.sub: Robot Swarm · Wireless Bus · XR · Edge AI
freya.scen7.t1.p: Replace cable harnesses inside the robot itself.
freya.scen7.t4.p: Inference at the edge over wide-area low-power links.
freya.tech.body: A reconfigurable RF front-end paired with a programmable baseband. Onshore-fabricated, NDAA-compliant supply chain, and field-upgradeable across the entire product life.
freya.tech.p3.s: Anti-jam, low probability of intercept, encrypted PHY.
freya.endcap.body: Long-range. Low-power. Built for the IoT decade.
glink.hero.lede: G-Link delivers kilometre-scale connectivity at coin-cell power — built for cities, grids, fields, and the long tail of devices that make modern infrastructure run.
glink.pos.body: G-Link occupies the gap between consumer Wi-Fi (high throughput, short range) and LPWAN (long range, low throughput) — delivering both, with IP-native networking and standards-based interoperability.
glink.pos.p3.s: Thousands of endpoints per access point.
glink.scen1.t1.p: Curb-level occupancy detection at urban scale.
glink.scen1.t2.p: Adaptive street-light networks tied to traffic and weather.
glink.scen1.t3.p: Air quality, noise, and microclimate sensing block-by-block.
glink.scen1.t4.p: Fill-level monitoring and dynamic collection routing.
glink.scen1.t5.p: Public-safety beacons, panic posts, and event mesh.
glink.scen2.t1.p: Predictive maintenance from the bearing to the boardroom.
glink.scen2.t2.p: Plant-wide consumption telemetry — real-time and granular.
glink.scen2.t3.p: Pressure, flow, and leak detection across long runs.
glink.scen2.t4.p: Worker localization, gas detection, and lone-worker alerts.
glink.scen3.t1.p: Substation telemetry and DER coordination at the edge.
glink.scen3.t2.p: Distribution network monitoring — flow, quality, leakage.
glink.scen3.t3.p: Wellhead, midstream, and storage telemetry across remote sites.
glink.scen4.t1.p: Moisture, salinity, and nutrient sensing across hectares.
glink.scen4.t3.p: Herd tracking, health telemetry, and virtual fencing.
glink.scen5.t1.p: End-to-end visibility across yards, ports, and routes.
glink.scen5.t2.p: Temperature integrity for pharma and perishables.
glink.scen6.t1.p: Connectivity to the underserved last mile.
flexv.hero.lede: FlexV is a defense-grade SDR platform that turns silicon into a moving target — adapting waveforms, modulations, and stacks faster than any adversary can characterize them.
flexv.pos.body: FlexV sits at the convergence of cognitive radio, electronic warfare, and commercial cellular — a single programmable platform that adapts to the environment instead of being designed around a frozen standard.
flexv.pos.p1.s: Sense, decide, and reconfigure in real time.
flexv.pos.p2.s: Military, commercial, IoT, and test on one stack.
flexv.pos.p3.s: Onshore fab, audited firmware, no foreign black boxes.
flexv.scen1.sub: Cognitive Radio · Tactical · Radar · SATCOM · NavWar
flexv.scen1.t1.p: Sense, decide, and adapt to the spectrum in real time.
flexv.scen1.t2.p: Battlefield mesh comms — jam-resilient and mobile.
flexv.scen1.t3.p: Multi-mode radar reprogrammable per mission profile.
flexv.scen1.t4.p: Multi-orbit ground terminals with software waveforms.
flexv.scen1.t5.p: GPS resilience and PNT under contested conditions.
flexv.scen2.t1.p: Pre-standard waveform development on production silicon.
flexv.scen3.t1.p: One gateway speaks every IoT dialect — software-switched.
flexv.scen3.t2.p: Wide-area base stations for industrial endpoints.
flexv.scen4.sub: Compliance · 5G Testing · Radar Sim · Channel Sounding
flexv.scen4.t1.p: Regulatory and conformance testing across regions.
flexv.scen4.t3.p: Threat emulation and electronic-warfare lab work.
flexv.scen4.t4.p: Empirical propagation studies for next-gen standards.
flexv.app.body: From cognitive military radios to test-bench instrumentation, FlexV's reprogrammability turns one silicon investment into a portfolio that grows with every firmware drop.
flexv.endcap.body: Freya. G-Link. FlexV. The silicon stack beneath the AI production era.
